calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Feb-11-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Willis Silverthorne for and with Arthur Knudsen (Executor). Quinton Miller for and with Stanley Buffa.

Mr. Miller stated that John Buffa has no assets, that he receives benefits from the VA for aid and attendance and that he would lose his benefits if he receives the bequest. In addition, he stated that Stanley received authority from his Father to file the disclaimer. Mr. Silverthorne stated that the will provided a benefit to his Client for use of the property during the term of probate, that the property needed to be sold, that moving expenses were incurred, that the move was necessitated by the Estate and that storage fees and rent were now at his Client's expense. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
